title: toxicodendron toxicarium
side_effects: Toxicodendron toxicarium can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic oils can cause blisters, rashes, and even burns. In severe cases, ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. Improper use of the plant can also trigger anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention.
